<!-- PR Template -->

## Area
<!-- arch / sw-ref / compiler / tlm / ca / rtl / tb / driver / ci / docs -->

## Summary
<!-- 一行描述 change 的本質 -->

## Motivation
<!-- 為什麼要改?link issue / spec section -->

## Spec Impact
- [ ] 無 spec 變更
- [ ] 有 spec 變更(檔案:`docs/...` / `specs/...`),同步更新 affected code
- [ ] Spec 變更但 code 尚未跟上(開 follow-up issue:#___)

## Test
- [ ] Local smoke pass
- [ ] Unit / block-level test pass
- [ ] CI smoke 綠
- [ ] Coverage 未下降

## Reviewer Checklist
- [ ] Coding style(依 `docs/coding_style.md`)
- [ ] 無 TODO / FIXME 未 link issue
- [ ] 文件與 code 同步
